name: Victory Metals Limited
analysis: VTM has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.5500, stop A$1.3316, target A$1.7150 (0.76:1) — then trail it.
